_comment: 画像品質調整。quality_suffixを変えるだけで全パス（generator.py / route.ts）に反映。negative_promptはinstant-character対応。
quality_suffix: shot on 35mm film, Kodak Portra 400, analog film grain, shallow depth of field, natural bokeh, soft natural window light, golden hour, moody atmosphere, cinematic color grading, muted emotional tones, realistic skin texture, photographic
elegance_block: properly fitted kimono with neat closed collar (kitsuke), layered han-eri visible, fine silk fabric with subtle woven texture, elegant and dignified posture, graceful composed expression, refined modest styling, a single full-length kimono as one continuous garment from shoulder to hem, same fabric and color throughout, NOT separated into top and skirt
negative_prompt: plastic skin, airbrushed, oversaturated, digital art, 3d render, cgi, overly smooth, perfect symmetry, glossy, western clothes, casual clothes, modern dress, shirt, jeans, western outfit, t-shirt, suit, open collar, exposed chest, loose kimono, off-shoulder, suggestive pose, cheap shiny fabric, polyester sheen, costume-like, two-piece outfit, separate skirt, hakama, robe over skirt, mismatched top and bottom, bathrobe
